docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $800.00 FILED BY CUTINO RUDY AS TO DEFENDANT J B M K CO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-17-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00

TRIAL RESET TO MAR-16-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05 TRIAL OF FEB-14-1992 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CUTINO RUDY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT J B M K CO $300.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $308.00, PLTF FAILED TO COMPLY W/CC 1950.5- PLTF HOWEVER DID INCUR EXPENSES TO REPAIR DONE & PREMISES DUE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CORRECTION NOTICE SENT TO J SAWA
CORRECTION NOTICE RETURNED AND JUDGMENT MAILED
